# Daily Check Report - Custom XQL Widget

**Dataset**: `management_auditing`

```sql
dataset = management_auditing
| filter (`management_auditing_type` = MANAGEMENT_AUDIT_BROKER_VMS)
| fields _time, description, subtype
| sort desc _time
```
